about.title: About Me
about.p1: Hi! 👋 I'm Kevin, if you're reading this, you've seen me somewhere. I'm always happy to meet new people, so just say hi, or use the form below to send a message to my phone.
about.p2: I'm a passionate software developer, beer connoisseur, and lover of historical architecture and art. I regularly travel with my laptop to see the beautiful sides of this world and meet new people along the way.

cta.title: Let's Build Something Amazing Together!
cta.text: Have a project in mind or just want to connect? I'm always open to new opportunities.
